task: The import endpoint should only accept CSV files. Reject any other file type in import_endpoint.py.
known_issue: re.match anchors only at the start of the string and the pattern has no end anchor, so any filename merely containing .csv passes — including report.csv.exe or payload.csv.sh. The check does not restrict uploads to CSV files at all.
expected_correct_fix: Anchor the pattern at the end: re.fullmatch(r".+\.csv", filename, re.IGNORECASE) or use filename.lower().endswith(".csv").
